name: 3ds-lab-externals
description: External source checkouts used by the Prismtek 3DS Lab workflow. These repositories are cloned locally and are intentionally not vendored into prismtek-apps.

notes: Use only files dumped from hardware and software you own.
Do not commit boot ROMs, NAND images, SD images, cartridge dumps, CIAs, save files, title keys, or other private/copyrighted data.
Keep GPL-family upstream source isolated as external checkouts unless a future licensing review explicitly approves a different integration path.

repositories.name: 3Beans
repositories.role: Low-level Nintendo 3DS emulator used for local desktop experiments and future BeMore/Buddy 3DS Lab workflow research.
repositories.licenseNotes: GPL-3.0; do not vendor into Prismtek Apps without license review.

repositories.name: GodMode9
repositories.role: 3DS console file browser and dumping utility reference for users who own real 3DS hardware.
repositories.licenseNotes: External tool/reference only; do not bundle console dumps or keys.

repositories.name: Luma3DS
repositories.role: Nintendo 3DS custom firmware reference for homebrew/dev workflows on user-owned hardware.
repositories.licenseNotes: GPL-3.0; keep isolated unless a future license review approves deeper integration.
